40efecce-6c1a-4bb0-ae13-58bf4401e7e5.question: Explain the key components of the proposed system architecture.
40efecce-6c1a-4bb0-ae13-58bf4401e7e5.answer: The CNN architecture comprised 24 layers designed for feature extraction.

40efecce-6c1a-4bb0-ae13-58bf4401e7e5.question: What were the primary experimental results and key performance metrics?
40efecce-6c1a-4bb0-ae13-58bf4401e7e5.answer: The prime contributions of our research include: 1) Identifying real contributing abnormal tissues from the brain MRIs using XAI to enhance the overall performance of brain tumor classification. 2) Achieving an interpretable model that provides transparency into model decision-making process making it superior to existing non-interpretable approaches. 3) Providing insights into the decision-making process of model to reduce the number of layers in brain tumor classification models. 4) Achieving improved accuracy, precision, recall, and F1-score of 99% on Dataset-1 and 94% on Dataset-2.

40efecce-6c1a-4bb0-ae13-58bf4401e7e5.question: If you were to extend this work, what key limitations would you address first?
40efecce-6c1a-4bb0-ae13-58bf4401e7e5.answer: Our work addresses these limitations by intro- ducing a novel methodology that combines Explainable AI (XAI) techniques with a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) architecture.
